description: Convenience hook to return a properly typed ref for the List component.

value.description:
Provides special properties (beyond the regular HTMLElement interface it also has available to it by inheritance) for manipulating <div> elements.

[MDN Reference](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/HTMLDivElement)
value.fullComment:
Provides special properties (beyond the regular HTMLElement interface it also has available to it by inheritance) for manipulating <div> elements.

[MDN Reference](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/HTMLDivElement)

type.name: ({ align, behavior, index, }: { align?: Align | undefined; behavior?: ScrollBehavior | undefined; index: number; }) => void
